quote: Chess is life in miniature.
author: Garry Kasparov

quote: The blunders are all there on the board.
author: Savielly Tartakower

quote: Chess demands total concentration.
author: Bobby Fischer

quote: Tactics flow from a superior position.
author: Bobby Fischer

quote: The winner of the game is the player who makes the next-to-last mistake.
author: Savielly Tartakower

quote: Every chess master was once a beginner.
author: Irving Chernev

quote: Chess is the gymnasium of the mind.
author: Blaise Pascal

quote: When you see a good move, look for a better one.
author: Emanuel Lasker

quote: A bad plan is better than no plan.
author: Mikhail Chigorin

quote: Chess teaches foresight.
author: Benjamin Franklin

quote: Pawns are the soul of chess.
author: François-André_Danican_Philidor

quote: Without error there can be no brilliancy.
author: Emanuel Lasker

quote: Chess is imagination.
author: David Bronstein

quote: The passed pawn is a criminal who should be kept under lock and key.
author: Aron Nimzowitsch

quote: In chess, as it is played by masters, chance is practically eliminated.
author: Emanuel Lasker

quote: You may learn much more from a game you lose than from a game you win.
author: José Raúl Capablanca

quote: I like the moment when I break a man's ego.
author: Bobby Fischer

quote: Chess is beautiful enough to waste your life for.
author: Hans Ree

quote: To avoid losing a piece, many players have lost the game.
author: Savielly Tartakower

quote: The essence of chess is thinking about what chess is.
author: David Bronstein

quote: Attackers may sometimes regret bad moves, but it is much worse to forever regret an opportunity you allowed to pass.
author: Garry Kasparov

quote: Chess first of all teaches you to be objective.
author: Alexander Alekhine

quote: Chess is 99 percent tactics.
author: Richard Teichmann

quote: Help your pieces so they can help you.
author: Paul Morphy

quote: The hardest game to win is a won game.
author: Emanuel Lasker

quote: Chess is a war over the board.
author: Bobby Fischer

quote: A sacrifice is best refuted by accepting it.
author: Wilhelm Steinitz

quote: Combination is a fusion of strategy and tactics.
author: Max Euwe

quote: Chess is the struggle against error.
author: Johannes Zukertort

quote: The beauty of a move lies not in its appearance but in the thought behind it.
author: Aaron Nimzowitsch

quote: Openings teach you openings. Endgames teach you chess.
author: Stephan Gerzadowicz

quote: One bad move nullifies forty good ones.
author: Horowitz

quote: The king is a fighting piece.
author: Wilhelm Steinitz

quote: Chess is everything: art, science, and sport.
author: Anatoly Karpov

quote: No price is too great for the scalp of the enemy king.
author: Koblentz

quote: Even a poor plan is better than no plan at all.
author: Mikhail Chigorin

quote: Chess is a fairy tale of 1001 blunders.
author: Savielly Tartakower

quote: A player without a plan is like a ship without a rudder.
author: Fred Reinfeld

quote: The isolated pawn spreads gloom over the entire chessboard.
author: Aaron Nimzowitsch

quote: All I want to do, ever, is just play chess.
author: Bobby Fischer

quote: The pin is mightier than the sword.
author: Fred Reinfeld

quote: Chess is not for timid souls.
author: Wilhelm Steinitz

quote: In order to improve your game, you must study the endgame before everything else.
author: José Raúl Capablanca

quote: The threat is stronger than the execution.
author: Aron Nimzowitsch

quote: Play the opening like a book, the middlegame like a magician, and the endgame like a machine.
author: Rudolf Spielmann

quote: Chess is ruthless: you've got to be prepared to kill people.
author: Nigel Short

quote: The tactic is knowing what to do when there is something to do.
author: Savielly Tartakower

quote: Strategy requires thought. Tactics require observation.
author: Max Euwe

quote: Chess makes men wiser and clear-sighted.
author: Vladimir Putin

quote: A chess game is a work of art between two minds.
author: Vasily Smyslov

quote: Chess is played with the mind and not with the hands.
author: Renaud and Kahn

quote: One doesn't have to play well, it's enough to play better than your opponent.
author: Siegbert Tarrasch

quote: The mistakes are there, waiting to be made.
author: Savielly Tartakower

quote: The pawns are the soul of chess.
author: Philidor

quote: Whoever sees no other aim in the game than that of giving checkmate to one's opponent will never become a good chess player.
author: Wilhelm Steinitz

quote: Chess holds its master in its own bonds.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: You cannot play at chess if you are kind-hearted.
author: French Proverb

quote: Chess is a sea in which a gnat may drink and an elephant may bathe.
author: Indian Proverb

quote: A passed pawn increases in strength as the number of pieces on the board diminishes.
author: José Raúl Capablanca

quote: In life, as in chess, forethought wins.
author: Charles Buxton

quote: Chess is the art of analysis.
author: Mikhail Botvinnik

quote: A sacrifice can only be sound if it forces the opponent to think.
author: David Bronstein

quote: To win against me, you must beat me.
author: Alexander Alekhine

quote: Chess is the touchstone of intellect.
author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

quote: Many have become chess masters; no one has become the master of chess.
author: Siegbert Tarrasch

quote: The essence of strategy is choosing what not to do.
author: Michael Porter

quote: It is not enough to be a good player; you must also play well.
author: Siegbert Tarrasch

quote: The beauty of chess is it can be whatever you want it to be.
author: Magnus Carlsen

quote: Some part of a mistake is always correct.
author: Savielly Tartakower

quote: A good player is always lucky.
author: José Raúl Capablanca

quote: I don't believe in psychology. I believe in good moves.
author: Bobby Fischer

quote: Every move creates a weakness.
author: Siegbert Tarrasch

quote: The king hunts in the endgame.
author: Reuben Fine

quote: Chess requires patience and precision.
author: Viswanathan Anand

quote: Confidence is very important—even pretending to be confident.
author: Magnus Carlsen

quote: Your body has to be in top condition. Your chess deteriorates as your body does.
author: Bobby Fischer

quote: The strongest weapon in chess is to have the next move.
author: David Bronstein

quote: Chess is a school of responsibility.
author: Mikhail Botvinnik

quote: One bad move can ruin an entire game.
author: Paul Morphy

quote: The beauty of a move often lies in its simplicity.
author: Anatoly Karpov

quote: Chess is a matter of delicate judgment.
author: Mikhail Tal

quote: The rook belongs behind the passed pawn.
author: Siegbert Tarrasch

quote: The isolated queen pawn yields an isolani position.
author: Aron Nimzowitsch

quote: Chess is a fight against your own mistakes.
author: Mikhail Tal

quote: A combination is a series of forcing moves.
author: Max Euwe

quote: The key to chess is knowing when to break the rules.
author: Garry Kasparov

quote: Chess teaches logic and discipline.
author: Viswanathan Anand

quote: Rapid chess trains intuition.
author: Magnus Carlsen

quote: The board is the world, the pieces are phenomena.
author: Novalis

quote: The foundation of every state is the education of its youth.
author: Diogenes

quote: The attack begins where the opponent least expects it.
author: Mikhail Tal

quote: No one ever won a game by resigning.
author: Savielly Tartakower

quote: A knight on the rim is dim.
author: Chess Proverb

quote: Centralize your king in the endgame.
author: Reuben Fine

quote: Time is what matters most in chess.
author: Magnus Carlsen

quote: The player who sees deeper wins.
author: Mikhail Botvinnik

quote: Strong players know openings. Great players know endings.
author: Savielly Tartakower

quote: Every chess game is a battle of ideas.
author: Anatoly Karpov

quote: You have to take your opponent into a deep dark forest.
author: Mikhail Tal

quote: The essence of chess lies in imagination.
author: David Bronstein

quote: Chess rewards hard work and persistence.
author: Viswanathan Anand
